questions.question: What is active voice?
options: The subject performs the action
The subject receives the action
The action is performed by the subject
Both A and C

questions.question: What is passive voice?
options: The subject performs the action
The subject receives the action
The action is performed by the subject
None of the above

questions.question: In active voice, the subject is:
options: The doer of the action
The receiver of the action
Neither doer nor receiver
Both doer and receiver

questions.question: In passive voice, the subject is:
options: The doer of the action
The receiver of the action
Neither doer nor receiver
Both doer and receiver

questions.question: What is the structure of active voice in simple present tense?
options: Subject + V1 + Object
Subject + is/am/are + V3 + by + Object
Subject + has/have + V3 + Object
Subject + will + V1 + Object

questions.question: What is the structure of passive voice in simple present tense?
options: Subject + V1 + Object
Subject + is/am/are + V3 + by + Object
Subject + has/have + V3 + Object
Subject + will + V1 + Object

questions.question: What is the structure of active voice in present continuous tense?
options: Subject + is/am/are + V1-ing + Object
Subject + is/am/are + being + V3 + by + Object
Subject + has/have + V3 + Object
Subject + will + V1 + Object

options: Subject + is/am/are + V1-ing + Object

Subject + has/have + V3 + Object
Subject + will + V1 + Object

Subject + is/am/are + V1-ing + Object
Subject + will + V1 + Object
